sutlanding.title: Registration Form
sutlanding.description: Registration Center for Clinical Consultation, Suranaree University of Technology Hospital
sutlanding.no_form_in_clinic: No assessment forms in this clinic
sutlanding.step1_desc: Find the form that matches your symptoms from the menu above
sutlanding.step2_desc: Answer truthfully. Your information will be kept confidential.
sutlanding.step3_desc: The system will analyze your data and show the results with preliminary advice
sutlanding.step4_desc: Our team will review your information and contact you as soon as possible
sutlanding.footer_desc: Registration Center for Clinical Consultation, Suranaree University of Technology Hospital
sutlanding.copyright: © {{year}} Suranaree University of Technology Hospital. All rights reserved.

search.title: Check Assessment History
search.desc: Please enter your 13-digit ID number to view your history

result.download_app_desc: To receive appointment notifications and track your service information more conveniently

form_view.pdpa_desc: The system requires your ID number to record and display your past assessment history, allowing you to continuously track your health progress.
form_view.pdpa_secret: (This information will be kept strictly confidential)
form_view.clear_form_confirm_desc: Do you want to clear all your answers? The information you entered will be lost.

assessment_result.error_desc: No data found for submission. Please try again.
assessment_result.consent_title: Do you agree to let our staff contact you?
assessment_result.consent_html:
Your information will be kept confidential
and forwarded to relevant staff only
for initial care and advice.
assessment_result.send_success_desc: Our staff has received your data. You can check your history.
assessment_result.eval_thanks_desc: You have already completed the system evaluation survey.
assessment_result.hero_saved_desc: Your data has been saved and the relevant staff has been notified.
assessment_result.hero_done_desc1:
Below is the summary of the initial analysis.
If you want further care, please click the “Send data to staff” button below.
assessment_result.hero_done_desc2:
Form completed.
Please click the “Send data to staff” button below to send your data.
assessment_result.eval_q1: You are satisfied with the interface, colors, and readable modern fonts.
assessment_result.eval_q2: The system responds and processes data (e.g. page load, form submission) quickly.
assessment_result.eval_q3: Information and initial advice from the system are clear and helpful.
assessment_result.eval_q4: The system is clear, easy to understand, and not confusing to use.
assessment_result.eval_q5: Overall, you are satisfied with using the system.
assessment_result.eval_sus1: I think that I would like to use this system frequently.
assessment_result.eval_sus2: I found the system unnecessarily complex.
assessment_result.eval_sus3: I thought the system was easy to use.
assessment_result.eval_sus4: I think that I would need the support of a technical person to be able to use this system.
assessment_result.eval_sus5: I found the various functions in this system were well integrated.
assessment_result.eval_sus6: I thought there was too much inconsistency in this system.
assessment_result.eval_sus7: I would imagine that most people would learn to use this system very quickly.
assessment_result.eval_sus8: I found the system very cumbersome to use.
assessment_result.eval_sus9: I felt very confident using the system.
assessment_result.eval_sus10: I needed to learn a lot of things before I could get going with this system.
